allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Zarog\\Downloads\\Nabil Louaar - Homepage _standalone_.html" -Raw; Write-Output "File size: $\($content.Length\) chars"; Write-Output "---FIRST 3000 CHARS---"; $content.Substring\(0, 3000\))

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Zarog\\Downloads\\Nabil Louaar - Homepage _standalone_.html" -Raw; $templateIdx = $content.IndexOf\('"__bundler/template"'\); Write-Output "Template tag found at: $templateIdx"; if \($templateIdx -gt 0\) { $content.Substring\($templateIdx, [Math]::Min\(3000, $content.Length - $templateIdx\)\) })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Zarog\\Downloads\\Nabil Louaar - Homepage _standalone_.html" -Raw; $templateStart = $content.IndexOf\('<script type="__bundler/template">'\) + 34; $templateEnd = $content.IndexOf\('</script>', $templateStart\); $jsonStr = $content.Substring\($templateStart, $templateEnd - $templateStart\).Trim\(\); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Web; $decoded = [System.Web.HttpUtility]::JavaScriptStringDecode\($jsonStr\); Write-Output "decoded len=$\($decoded.Length\)"; $decoded | Out-File "C:\\Users\\Zarog\\Downloads\\nabil_ext.html" -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline; \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Zarog\\Downloads\\nabil_ext.html"\).Length)
